narrative:
Holmes - Texas (precinct in Crawford County) has 1,102 registered voters, with 46.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 42.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 31.3 percentage points.
